engine: Basin OS V4.1 Full Migration Radar Runner

compliance.linkedin: No LinkedIn page scraping. Stores possible LinkedIn profile URLs from Brave public search results only.
compliance.outreach: No auto-send. Manual review required before every outreach.

routingRules.ready: Groq says real person + email + score >= 58.
routingRules.linkedinVerify: Groq says real person + LinkedIn URL but no email.
routingRules.cpaVerify: Groq says real person + CPA/tax/referral relevance.
routingRules.skipped: No email, no LinkedIn URL, no CPA/referral path.
